name: S8: Opioid Trajectory — Baseline Characterization
description: Baseline covariate profile comparison between new opioid users and chronic pain patients initiating NSAIDs. Evaluates demographic, clinical, and pharmacological balance for the Opioid Trajectory study.

design_json.description: Baseline characterization comparing demographic, clinical, and pharmacological profiles of new opioid users vs NSAID chronic pain patients across demographics, conditions, drugs, measurements, procedures, and visits in the 365 days prior to index.
